definitions: To maintain a resentful or defiant attitude due to a perceived grievance or sense of inferiority.
To be easily angered or constantly looking for a fight because of past mistreatment.
examples: Ever since he was passed over for the promotion, he's got a chip on his shoulder.
He's got a chip on his shoulder and thinks everyone is out to get him.
lemma: have a chip on one's shoulder
source: he's got a chip on his shoulder
